candidate.title: MetaX C500, C500X, C550, and C588 accelerator catalog field promotion

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Existing local captures found and reused: raw/crawler/compute-accelerators-metax-c500/20260628T060652781059Z-www-metax-tech-com-prod-html-8de5962075.md, raw/crawler/compute-accelerators-metax-c500x/20260628T060653016639Z-www-metax-tech-com-prod-html-51b80e7359.md, raw/crawler/compute-accelerators-metax-c550/20260628T060653231697Z-www-metax-tech-com-prod-html-ea84ef2c6c.md, and raw/crawler/compute-accelerators-metax-c588/20260628T060653452377Z-www-metax-tech-com-prod-html-9d84457b12.md. No new external fetch was needed.
local_checks.wiki_search: Existing curated comparison text mentioned MetaX C500, C500X, C550, and C588 as raw comparison evidence, but no metax-c500, metax-c500x, metax-c550, or metax-c588 SKU, observation, or resolved-spec rows existed before this parent task.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: ai_infra wiki/index.md routes this work to Compute Accelerator Spec Catalog, Compute Accelerator Parameter Comparison, and AI Infra Coverage Map; no dedicated MetaX C-series page was needed.
local_checks.prior_manifest_scan: Prior continuation parent-1 through parent-11 manifests cover Corigine, SGLang, Yusur, NVIDIA H200, Kubernetes/Kueue/Volcano, AWS/Lambda, Resnics N2025, NVIDIA confidential inference, Asterfusion, Kunlunxin R200, and Iluvatar Tiangai. This task does not repeat those rows and promotes only the MetaX C-series source-visible product-spec slice.

duplicate_boundary_checks.result: Hardware layer previously listed the MetaX product pages as raw crawler evidence only. Parent-12 records the narrower boundary where C500, C500X, C550, and C588 expose form factor, memory capacity, MetaXLink wording, and maximum power.
Added one known_source entry for parent-12 MetaX C-series fields without mutating blocked_items or unrelated coverage gaps.
No pre-existing metax-c500, metax-c500x, metax-c550, or metax-c588 SKU rows; added one SKU per product page.
No pre-existing MetaX C-series observations; added four observations per product for form_factor, memory_capacity, interconnect, and tdp.
No pre-existing MetaX C-series resolved fields; added resolved fields pointing to the new MetaX observations only.

Existing metax-c500-product-page, metax-c500x-product-page, metax-c550-product-page, and metax-c588-product-page source registry entries were reused; the source registry was not modified because it already contained the needed source IDs.

Existing raw comparison rows now include resolved-spec citations and explicit caveats for unsupported compute, memory generation, memory-bandwidth, host-interface, virtualization, ecosystem, production-operation, server, and supernode claims.

Catalog coverage text now treats C500, C500X, C550, and C588 as bounded structured product rows and keeps unsupported qualitative, benchmark, throughput, virtualization, ecosystem, server, and supernode claims outside resolved fields.

gap_reason: The local corpus already contained official product-specific MetaX C500, C500X, C550, and C588 captures with source-visible, schema-supported fields that had not yet been promoted into the structured accelerator catalog.

fields.interconnect: MetaXLink optical interconnect supports 16-card to 64-card Scale-up topology

schema_boundary.source_value: C500, C500X, C550, and C588 pages state high-bandwidth memory capacity but do not identify the memory generation or exact memory bandwidth.
schema_boundary.boundary: Promoted memory_capacity only. memory_type and memory_bandwidth remain unresolved.

schema_boundary.source_value: C500 and C500X pages describe PCIe card form factors but do not expose a PCIe generation or lane count.
schema_boundary.boundary: Promoted form_factor only. host_interface remains unresolved.

schema_boundary.source_value: C500X page states MetaXLink optical Scale-up from 16 to 64 cards, while C550 and C588 pages state MetaXLink 8-card all-to-all up to 896GB/s.
schema_boundary.boundary: Recorded only as bounded interconnect strings because spec-fields.yaml supports interconnect; no per-link bandwidth, server, supernode, or topology performance field is inferred.

schema_boundary.source_value: C500 and C550 pages include 1% granularity virtualization wording.
schema_boundary.boundary: Not promoted because the catalog has no virtualization field and the source text is a qualitative feature, not a resolved accelerator specification.

schema_boundary.source_value: C588 page states one eight-card machine can run DeepSeek full version and other pages include mainstream GPU ecosystem compatibility and application text.
schema_boundary.boundary: Not promoted as benchmark, ecosystem-completion, production-operation, service-SLO, training-throughput, inference-throughput, or model-operation evidence.

schema_boundary.source_value: MetaX C600, servers, workstations, supernodes, N-series, G-series, X-series, and unrelated accelerators appear in navigation or adjacent comparison evidence.
schema_boundary.boundary: No non-C500/C500X/C550/C588 SKU, observation, or resolved row is created or modified by parent-12.

non_promoted_boundaries: No MetaX C600, N-series, G-series, X-series, server, workstation, supernode, AMD, Intel, Huawei, Enflame, Iluvatar, Biren, Kunlunxin, Resnics, Corigine, Yusur, Asterfusion, or unrelated accelerator row was promoted by this task.

No exact compute peak, memory generation, memory bandwidth, host-interface generation or lane count, benchmark ranking, DeepSeek/model operation, ecosystem compatibility, virtualization guarantee, production incident/postmortem, service SLO, training throughput, inference throughput, local benchmark baseline, MLCommons submission, legal-compliance completion, server product, supernode, or aggregate-system claim was promoted from the MetaX pages.
No new external source was fetched, and no crawler subscriptions or Domain Channels were changed.
Existing H200, Cambricon, Kunlunxin, Biren, Corigine, Resnics, Yusur, Asterfusion, and Iluvatar resolved fields were not intentionally changed.
